name: ChatPD API
description: REST API for dataset usage in academic papers. Use this base URL to fetch data programmatically or via AI agents. NOTE: The web UI loads all data from this API — do NOT scrape the HTML pages, they contain no data.

data_status.description: Get data source status (total records, datasets, last update time). Good first call to verify API is reachable.

datasets.description: List all dataset entities with usage counts (paginated). per_page max 100.

dataset_detail.description: Get one dataset's details, usage records, and summary. URL-encode dataset_entity.

query.description: Search records. q=keywords, field=all|arxiv_id|title|dataset_name|dataset_entity|task|data_type, match_mode=any|all|exact, sort_by=latest|earliest|title, arxiv_from/arxiv_to=YYMM format (e.g. 2401). per_page max 50.

paper.description: Get all dataset usage records for a paper by arXiv ID.

filters.description: Get top data types and tasks for filter UI.
